overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a dark medieval village at night. The player walks along dirt paths between thatched-roof cottages and timber-framed buildings, briefly drawing a wooden club while navigating the settlement.

large timber-framed building with dark wooden beams

simple wooden post fence running alongside the path

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow dirt path in a medieval village at night, with a thatched-roof cottage on the right and a timber-framed barn on the left. The scene is dimly lit with sparse vegetation along the path and a wooden fence visible on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between timber-framed village houses

events.description: character draws a wooden club and holds it in left hand while continuing to walk

agents.ego_description: navigating between buildings with a wooden club drawn, turning left through the narrow village passage

entered.detail: timber-framed cottage with plaster walls visible as the camera turns

segments.scene_description: The character draws a wooden club and continues walking through a narrower passage between timber-framed buildings, turning left as they navigate the medieval village layout. The timber-framed barn on the left moves closer while the thatched cottage passes out of view behind.

events.description: figure appears in doorway of timber-framed building ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching a building with a figure in the doorway, then moving past into a more open village area

notable_agents.action: standing in doorway of timber-framed house, then moving back inside as the player approaches

entered.detail: two-story timber-framed house with illuminated doorway where the figure stands
open village space with distant buildings visible in the background
warm light sources from windows or fires in distant buildings

segments.scene_description: Approaching a timber-framed house with a figure visible in the doorway, the character moves past into a more open village square. The wooden club is no longer visible as the player continues exploring the settlement, with distant lights from other buildings visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dimly lit medieval village that transitions from narrow alleyways into a more open settlement square. It begins by moving along a narrow dirt path flanked by a thatched-roof cottage and a timber-framed barn under the cover of night. As the camera navigates a tighter passage between timber buildings, the character draws a wooden club, turning left while the barn looms closer and the cottage fades from view. The scene then shifts toward a timber-framed house where a figure stands in the doorway, before the camera glides past into a wider village square. Finally, the club disappears from sight as the view expands to reveal distant lights flickering from other buildings across the settlement.
